rationale: Manual Stage C rerun preserved 11 ordered page ids and source checksums.
Output used page_module_spec_v0.yaml as the per-page sidecar and included required identity/module_definition/interfaces/performance/composition/evidence_review blocks.
Source XML immutability, project-local output policy, no raw XML, no workflow-package writes, no material/MDD/harness/final-registration claims were explicit.
classification_rationale, structural_scope unknown, review_required posture, blank normalized refs, and local_internal_candidates separation were explicit.
automatic_rule_gap_note: The rule evaluator under-scored equivalent manifest fields because it looked for page_module_spec_ref/page_module_spec_sha256 literal keys; manual review accepts sidecar_file plus source_sha256/registration key refs as equivalent for this calibration.
boundary: public_safe_structural_fixture_only; no raw XML, runtime path, _workspaces output, _workmeta truth, credential, cookie, or private-state material archived
